revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Yourjs]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Yourjs]]</includeonly>

[[Special:MyPage/{{#switch: {{{js}}} | skin = skin.css | cologne = cologneblue.js | modern = modern.js | monobook = monobook.js | vector = vector.js | common = common.js | common.js }}|{{{disp|your {{{js|common}}} JavaScript}}}]]<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
revision.text: [[Special:MyPage/{{#switch: {{{js}}} | skin = skin.css | cologne = cologneblue.js | modern = modern.js | monobook = monobook.js | vector = vector.js | common = common.js | common.js }}|{{{disp|your {{{js|common}}} JavaScript}}}]]<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
